prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主 榜2026年升至第44名（2021年53→2025年50→2026年44），排名持续上升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；抖音总排名第8（高热），短视频曝光量大；2025年声誉 偏负面（投档线异常高关注，黑龙江389分录取事件引发讨论），2026年声誉偏负面但以中性舆情回应为主，整体报考关注度较高但存在一定负面情绪。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，与郑州大学物理类招生专业（计算机、电子信息、自动化等 ）高度匹配，带动报考热度；辽宁省2026年物理类考生估算约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争压力未明显变化；郑州大学位于河南，在辽宁招生属省外中等规模，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年回升趋势、2026年计划持平、软科 排名上升至第44名、抖音高热及热门工科专业热度带动，预计竞争略有加剧；但2025年投档异常事件对部分考生报考心理有一定抑制作用，两者对冲后小幅修正。预测最低位次约 23548名，区间23048–24048名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14627 → 16539 → 27488 → 25893 → 23598. In 2023, due to a gap, it significantly dropped to 27488, but has been steadily recovering in the past two years, with a baseline of about 23598 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 175 → 180 → 181 → 187 → 183, and the 2026 plan is 183, unchanged from 2025. The stable plan has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking rose to 44th in 2026 (53rd in 2021 → 50th in 2025 → 44th in 2026), with continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. TikTok overall ranking 8th (high heat), with high short video exposure. In 2025, reputation was slightly negative (abnormally high attention to admission lines, the Heilongjiang 389-point admission incident sparked discussion), and in 2026, reputation remains slightly negative but mainly with neutral public opinion responses. Overall, application attention is high but with some negative sentiment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Zhengzhou University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc.), driving application heat. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Liaoning Province is about 143,600, basically unchanged from 2025, with no significant change in competitive pressure. Zhengzhou University is located in Henan, with a medium-scale enrollment in Liaoning as an out-of-province institution, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent two-year upward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 plan, the Soft Science ranking rising to 44th, high TikTok heat, and the heat of popular engineering majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify. However, the abnormal admission incident in 2025 has a certain inhibitory effect on some examinees' application psychology, and the two factors offset each other, leading to a minor correction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23548, with a range of 23048–24048.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 24000), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors, while also considering Tier 3 majors as safety.
